mapper.insert: insert into message(user_id, content, like_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{userId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select: select message.id as id, message.user_id as userId, user.username, user.nickname, message.content, message.like_count, message.created_at as createdAt from message inner join user on message.user_id = user.id where message.is_deleted = 0 and message.id = #{id}

select message.id as id, message.user_id as userId, user.username, user.nickname, message.content, message.like_count, message.created_at as createdAt from message inner join user on message.user_id = user.id where message.is_deleted = 0 order by case when #{sortType} = 'latest' then message.updated_at end desc, case when #{sortType} = 'hot' then message.like_count end desc
select message_like.message_id from message_like inner join message on message_like.message_id = message.id where message_like.user_id = #{userId} and message.is_deleted = 0

select message.id as id, message.user_id as userId, user.username, user.nickname, message.content, message.like_count, message.created_at as createdAt from message inner join user on message.user_id = user.id where message.is_deleted = 0 order by message.updated_at desc

select message.id as id, message.user_id as userId, user.username, user.nickname, message.content, message.like_count, message.created_at as createdAt, message.updated_at as updatedAt from message inner join user on message.user_id = user.id where message.is_deleted = 0 and message.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into message_like(message_id, user_id, created_at) values (#{messageId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: update message set like_count = #{likeCount} where id = #{id}
update message set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, user_id, content, like_count, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted from message
and content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by updated_at desc
select id, message_id, user_id, created_at from message_like where message_id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
select id from message_like where message_id = #{id}
